q: Rest three fingers on your wrist below the thumb. The RATE of the beat?

opts.t: Fast and irregular — it skips, hurries, wanders

q: The QUALITY under your fingers? (Classical images: snake · frog · swan)

opts.t: Thin and slithering — a snake moving under the skin
Jumping and definite — a frog leaping
Deep and gliding — a swan crossing water
